hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "=== Claude Agile (ccpm layer) ==="; if [ -f .claude-agile/config.json ]; then echo "Methodology: $(cat .claude-agile/config.json | grep methodology | cut -d\"\" -f4)"; echo ""; fi; if [ -f .claude/skills/ccpm/references/scripts/status.sh ]; then echo "--- ccpm Status ---"; bash .claude/skills/ccpm/references/scripts/status.sh 2>/dev/null || echo "ccpm status: no active epics"; echo ""; elif [ -d .claude/skills/ccpm ]; then echo "ccpm: installed (no status script found)"; echo ""; else echo "ccpm: NOT INSTALLED -- run: git clone https://github.com/automazeio/ccpm.git && ln -s ccpm/skill/ccpm .claude/skills/ccpm"; echo ""; fi; if [ -f SPRINT.md ]; then echo "--- Sprint ---"; head -15 SPRINT.md; echo ""; fi; if [ -f DAILY.md ]; then echo "--- Recent Activity ---"; tail -20 DAILY.md; fi'
